title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, MTR Foods Capital India in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MTR Foods Capital India:
MTR Foods Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods Capital India!
